summary: COMPARISON: LEFT ComplexPlane with BLUE shaded |z|<1 disk (Σz^n convergence) + always_redraw z-dot that turns RED when outside. RIGHT ComplexPlane with GREEN shaded full plane (Σz^n/n! converges everywhere). Phases: rotate at r=0.5 (both converge), grow r to 1.8 (LEFT diverges), rotate at r=1.8.
